title: exacum tetragonum var. stylosum
intro: Exacum tetragonum var. stylosum, also known as the Blue Pimpernel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Exacum tetragonum var. stylosum include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as acne and wounds, as well as its use in reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Exacum tetragonum var. stylosum include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
